name: infinite-canvas
label: Infinite Canvas
description: A pannable, zoomable infinite surface. Scroll or trackpad to glide with momentum, dispatch events to zoom or recenter, and drop any content in the middle. Optional dotted background.
example: Pan around me

props.name: centerCanvasOnResize
props.description: Re-center the viewport whenever the window resizes.

usage: Zoom and recenter from anywhere by dispatching window events: canvas-zoom-in, canvas-zoom-out, canvas-center, and canvas-position ({ x, y }).
